creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just verified that things are sane and LGTM:

# make check-already-installed && echo not installed
# pwd
/usr/ports/devel/lutok
===>  Checking if devel/lutok already installed
not installed

(without DOCS and EXAMPLES)

# make check-already-installed && echo not installed
===>  Checking if devel/lutok already installed
not installed
# find /usr/local/ -name \*lutok\*

Cheers!
-Garrett
